title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Immigration and Foreigners Act, 2025. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st day of September, 2025, vide notification No. S.O. 3981 (E), dated 31st August, 2025, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (ii).
